name: Herbed Chicken Piccata
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a shallow dish; set aside.
2. Place the chicken between two sheets of heavy-duty plastic wrap and flatten to 1/4-inch thickness using a meat mallet or rolling pin. Lightly coat both sides of the chicken with cooking spray, then dredge the chicken in the breadcrumb mixture.
3. Melt the margarine in a large nonstick skillet coated with cooking spray over medium-high heat. Add the chicken and cook for 4 minutes on each side or until done. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside; keep warm. Add lemon slices to the skillet and sauté for 30 seconds. Add broth, parsley, and lemon juice, and cook for 1 minute. Spoon the sauce over the chicken.
Yield: 4 servings
CAL:160; FAT:2.9g, PRO:27.3g, CARB:6.9g; FIBER:0.4g; CHOL:66mg; IRON:1.4mg; SODIUM:115mg; CALC:46mg.
